scripts.demo:p0: npm run proof:p0 && npm run build:p0-demo
scripts.demo:p1: npm run proof:p1 && npm run build:p1-demo
scripts.proof:p0: node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces proof --fixture fixtures/p0 --out artifacts/p0
scripts.proof:p1: npm run proof:p0 && node bin/interfacectl.js surfaces adapter proof --catalog artifacts/p0/governed-catalog.json --fixture fixtures/p1 --out artifacts/p1
scripts.check:p0: npm run materialize:p0 && npm run proof:p0 && npm run build:p0-demo && npm test
scripts.check:p0:ci: npm run check:p0 && git diff --exit-code -- schemas fixtures artifacts demo && npm run check:p0:untracked
scripts.check:p0:untracked: bash -lc 'untracked="$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- artifacts/p0 demo/p0 fixtures/p0 schemas/runtime-catalog.v0.schema.json schemas/surface-ir.v0.schema.json schemas/fixture-expectations.v0.schema.json schemas/extract.v0.schema.json schemas/adapter-diagnostics.v0.schema.json schemas/evidence.v0.schema.json schemas/diagnostics.v0.schema.json scripts/build-p0-demo.mjs scripts/materialize-p0.mjs src/p0.js test/p0-proof.test.js)"; if test -n "$untracked"; then printf "untracked P0 files must be added:\n%s\n" "$untracked"; exit 1; fi'
scripts.check:p1: npm run materialize:p1 && npm run proof:p1 && npm run build:p1-demo && npm test
scripts.check:p1:ci: npm run check:p1 && git diff --exit-code -- schemas fixtures artifacts demo && npm run check:p1:untracked
scripts.check:p1:untracked: bash -lc 'untracked="$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- artifacts/p1 demo/p1 fixtures/p1 schemas/runtime-projection.v0.schema.json schemas/render-plan.v0.schema.json schemas/runtime-adapter-report.v0.schema.json schemas/runtime-adapter-evidence.v0.schema.json schemas/runtime-adapter-expectations.v0.schema.json schemas/runtime-adapter-diagnostics.v0.schema.json scripts/build-p1-demo.mjs scripts/materialize-p1.mjs src/p1-contract.js src/p1-proof.js test/p1-proof.test.js)"; if test -n "$untracked"; then printf "untracked P1 files must be added:\n%s\n" "$untracked"; exit 1; fi'
